<@U080B9NAZ25> Revisions for the lamkin clinic: <https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1MPywtyYfuDycyg9hBChiYBQzQeDKtDrC>
Here's our feedback on our ad videos -

Looks great overall, just a few nitpicky things:

1. we don't feel like the music selections really fit our older audience demographic
2. we'd like to nix the sparkle animations
3. there are few places we would add or drop a period/slight copy changes but nothing big there.
*Music:*
We get how those choices work for most medspas, however our ideal audience may be a little different. Most are from Edmond, Arcadia, Piedmont, Nichols Hills OK - high income areas with a higher percentage of older residents. Our best EMSculpt patient demographic is age 40-75, household annual income of $300k and up, interested in wellness, longevity and performance in addition to esthetics.

We know you have to source royalty free music, but maybe some taste profile references could be Khruangbin, Joy Oladokun, Hollow Coves? A faster tempo/higher energy is fine too but the vibe should have some authority/trust/emotional safety and less young/fast & cheap vibes. Also - we prefer minimal or no vocals where possible because for an older audience it may add less cognitive load as they're trying to read the ad.

Ad 1:
• It says "only 7 non-surgical lipo spots left in Oklahoma" - feels a little odd to say/disingenuous since there are other offices in the state advertising EMSculpt. I am guessing this is to signal location so leads know we're near to them? Can we word this differently - "only 7 non-surgical lipo spots left in our Edmond clinic" or if location signaling isn't important maybe just say "only 7 non-surgical lipo spots left"?
• We don't like the sparkle design elements, we are trying to position ourselves as a safer, medical authority to pursue these treatments with vs. the glittery med spas you may want to sue later
• Of all the ads, this song choice is neutral for us
Ad 2:
• strong no on this music
Ad 3:
• please replace the music
• Reads: "My stomach finally looks flat without sucking it in local client" let's drop "local client" please. 
• "Clients are seeing visibly changes in just a few sessions" can we change clients to "patients" since we are positioned as a clinic?
• "Emsculpt Neo non-surgical lipo at the Lamkin Clinic." please remove the period at the end if it's a fragment statement vs. a full sentence
• Claim your spot before it fills click below." Maybe take the period off altogether or move it to the end of "before it fills."
Ad 4:
• please replace the music
• "No Gym. No sweating No effort." add a period after sweating please
• "EMSculpt Neo body sculpting experience." No period here please
Ad 5:
• please replace the music (the vibe starts out ok - but the lyrics aren't great "I'm lonely...crying in my room")
• please eliminate the sparkle animations
• says that EMsculpt is regularly $699 (the other videos say $899 - and our actual pricing is $833 for one session, please change all original pricing references in all ads to say $833)
That's it on ad videos, and thanks for your patience while we calibrate to working together!
